exercises.title: Decode a JWT
exercises.description: Paste a sample JWT into a decoder and identify the header, payload, and signature parts.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can read the claims and explain what is and is not trusted.

exercises.title: Inspect a session cookie
exercises.description: Log in to a demo app and inspect the cookie attributes in DevTools.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can identify Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite flags.

exercises.title: Hash passwords properly
exercises.description: Write a script that hashes passwords with bcrypt or Argon2 and verifies them.
exercises.expected_outcome: The script stores slow password hashes and validates logins.

exercises.title: Simulate an OAuth flow
exercises.description: Walk through an authorization-code exchange and observe the role of PKCE.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can trace code exchange, token issuance, and PKCE verification.

exercises.title: Build a session-based login flow
exercises.description: Create a tiny app with login, server-side sessions, logout, and protected routes.
exercises.expected_outcome: Authenticated users can access protected pages and sessions can be revoked.

exercises.title: Add RBAC to an API
exercises.description: Implement role checks for a few endpoints and enforce authorization decisions on the server.
exercises.expected_outcome: Different users receive different access based on role.
